title: Getting 403 when creating Custom Field Type block
excerpt:
Hi All, 
For some reason I can’t create a custom field type in my monday app, it throws a 403 forbidden. 
Any reason this might be happening? 
Here’s a video showing the issue: Loom | Free Screen & Video Recording Softwa…

posts.author: mrautomation (Virtenia Sync - Integration for QuickBooks)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

For some reason I can’t create a custom field type in my monday app, it throws a 403 forbidden.

Any reason this might be happening?

Here’s a video showing the issue: Loom | Free Screen & Video Recording Software | Loom

Cheers,
Chris

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mrautomation,

Sorry to see that you’re running into this weird issue! Are you seeing any error messages on the UI side?

Small detail, but what happens if you try in an Incognito Window in the most updated version of Google Chrome and close all other windows that have your monday.com account open?

I also see that you have 2 identical custom fields open, I would try to remove them to see if you can create one from scratch.

Let me know if the issue persists we can troubleshoot this as a possible bug.

posts.author: mrautomation (Virtenia Sync - Integration for QuickBooks)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Helen thanks for the reply!

I just tried the incognito window with most updated version of Google Chrome to no avail.

I think this is a bug

Cheers,
Chris

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
@mrautomation

Ahh darn, sorry to hear. Do you mind writing into appsupport@monday.com?

I can then ask for some more account-related information for the bug report.

Thanks!

posts.author: mrautomation (Virtenia Sync - Integration for QuickBooks)
posts.cookedHtml: Will write to them now! I was writing to support@monday.com so I appreciate you sending over this email!

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
For future readers: @mrautomation was able to resolve it!

He was trying to edit his custom field type block on a live version. Switching to a newer, unpublished version fixed the issue.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
